meaning: n.(食时浇辣椒酱的)马来西亚色拉
examples: In my memory, everytime we go there, we will play at playground, take picture and eat ABC and rojak.
Talk about lifestyle, it reminds me of Rojak, which is a fruit and vegetable dish commonly found in Singapore.
Add rich, unique flavor and sweet with Rojak sauce is the mainly feature of this traditional Malaysian Penang snacks.
